{{Quote|The rescue mission to Vandos was to be simple—to land ahead of the approaching Separatist invasion fleet and bring out Ambassador Quiyyen. We found instead a large force of battle droids awaiting us. The Ambassador was the ''bait'' for the trap.|Jedi Padawan Flynn Kybo, on the rescue of Quiyyen|<ref name="gg1" />}}
'''Quiyyen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], Quiyyen was kidnapped by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], who planned to use him as bait to lure several [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] into a trap in a dug-out cave on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vandos]]. To rescue the Anx Ambassador, a Jedi and [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] team, led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[T'chooka D'oon]], was [[Rescue mission to Vandos|dispatched]] to the planet. Despite being quickly overrun by Grievous's [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] force, D'oon's [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Flynn Kybo]], nonetheless retrieved the captive Quiyyen from Grievous's possession. As D'oon's team made its way toward its [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]], Grievous [[Death/Legends|killed]] D'oon, but his team, along with Quiyyen, fled the area aboard the gunship.

==Biography==
{{Quote|There was nothing to be done. The Ambassador was safely onboard. For all our casualties, we had succeeded.|Flynn Kybo, on the death of T'chooka D'oon, and the success of their mission|<ref name="gg1" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]], Quiyyen served as an [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="cswe" /> In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Quiyyen was kidnapped by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], a [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] who was regarded as a threat to the Republic by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Grievous himself took the captive Anx Ambassador to the<ref name="gg1" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="tea">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Vandos]], where he was confined in a dug-out cliff cave. There, the cyborg general plotted to use Quiyyen as bait to lure several Jedi into a trap in the cave. His plan worked, as a team of Jedi and [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[T'chooka D'oon]], was [[Rescue mission to Vandos|sent]] to Vandos to retrieve the captured Ambassador.<ref name="gg1" />

Unknown to D'oon's team, Grievous had organized a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] force to help fight off any threat. When it entered the cave, D'oon's team was quickly overrun by Grievous's battle [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. During the [[Lightfight|firefight]], D'oon's [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Flynn Kybo]], found Quiyyen and brought him to safety. With the Ambassador rescued, the two Jedi and [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] prepared to retreat to their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]], which was hovering outside the cliff cave's entrance. To give his team and Quiyyen more [[Time/Legends|time]] to enter the [[Transport/Legends|transport]], D'oon attacked the approaching Grievous but was [[Death/Legends|slain]] by the cyborg general. Although he killed D'oon, Grievous failed to stop the Jedi Master's companions, as their gunship—with Quiyyen aboard—departed from the area.<ref name="gg1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Quiyyen first appeared in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]]. He was later briefly mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' and in author [[Abel G. Peña]]'s story ''[[Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous]]''. In [[2008]], Quiyyen received a short entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
